creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
The attached patch updates x11-toolkits/sakura to version 2.4.2.

From pkg-descr: "Sakura is a terminal emulator based on GTK and VTE". 

Can anyone move this port to x11 and change CATEGORIES? This is the place where all other terminal emulators (eterm, xterm, rxvt-unicode, etc.) reside. So why x11-toolkits?

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
